texto: Long before there was ever a King James Version of our Bible, there was a gospel truth...and long before doctrines and denominations, the preeminence of the gospel was already ripe to harvest. Before man had ever thought about creating symbols to represent spiritual things...there was a gospel.
explicacao: Citação de Chandel L. White sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Long before there was ever a King James Version of our Bible, there was a gospel truth...and long…” articula reflexao, allegory, christianity em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como christianity e esoteric-wisdom.
